sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value NUMERIC(10,2), description VARCHAR(100));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, description) VALUES (1, 10.00, 'Sample 1'), (2, NULL, 'Sample 2'), (3, 5.00, 'Sample 3');
SELECT mts_connect(1) AS conn_status, value / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table) AS avg_value FROM test_table GROUP BY value HAVING avg_value > 0;

SELECT mts_connect(1) AS conn_status, id, value / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE description IS NOT NULL) AS adjusted_value FROM test_table WHERE adjusted_value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY adjusted_value DESC;
SELECT mts_connect(1) AS conn_status, id, value / NULL AS div_null_check FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT mts_connect(1) FROM DUAL HAVING 10 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL) < 1;
SELECT value AS divided_value FROM (SELECT value / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table) AS value FROM test_table) AS sub_query WHERE divided_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT mts_connect(1) AS conn_status, value, (value / 2) + (value / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE value > 0 AND description LIKE 'Sample%')) AS complex_calc FROM test_table;

SELECT mts_connect(1) AS conn_status FROM (SELECT id, value / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AS normalized_value FROM test_table) AS derived_table WHERE normalized_value > 0.5;
